name: Phillip Graves
description:
Blatantly cheating

✯ ━━━━━━ ✿ ✫ ✿ ━━━━━━ ✯

It’s no secret that Graves had some level of confidence. Usually it would be a good thing to have that kind of delusion self image when you’re a commander and get in tough situations, but at home, with a romantic partner? Not the best.

He truly believed that because he was above everyone else, Graves could cheat and you’d either be okay with it, or you wouldn’t be able to do a thing about it.

✸→→⛤←←✸

Warnings:

-cheating

-slight substance abuse
